defaultLanguageDesc: Select default language for the widget
widgetContentModeDesc: What visitors see first in the widget. If the full project block is enabled, they can still switch tabs after load.
widgetContentModeDescNoGenplan: This project has no site plan. Choose the initial tab: building view, chessboard, apartment list, or a single building.
widgetSubProjectEmpty: No sub-projects in this project. Add them in the editor or pick another main screen mode.
subProjectSelectRequired: Select a sub-project for single-building mode.
description: Create and configure embeddable widgets for your projects
embedCodeDesc: Copy this code and paste it on your website
linksDesc: Use these links to access the widgets directly
settingsDesc: Select project and configure widget parameters
title: Widgets
widgetScriptDesc: Main JavaScript file for the widget
showFullProjectDesc: Show full apartment chessboard with filters inside the widget block.
showFloatingButtonDesc: Show a round button in the corner with a link to the project page.
floatingButtonPositionDesc: Position settings are applied only if the floating button is enabled.
atLeastOneOptionRequired: You must enable at least one option: show project or floating button.
